nodes.name: Expand — One Item Per External Attendee

parameters.query: ={{ "SELECT Id, Name, Status, Email, OwnerId FROM Lead WHERE Email = '" + $json.currentAttendeeEmail + "' AND IsConverted = false AND IsDeleted = false LIMIT 1" }}

nodes.name: Match Attendee Email to Salesforce Lead

additionalFields.description:
={{ 'Meeting booked via ' + $json.calendarSource + ' calendar.

Lead: ' + $json.leadName + '
Meeting Start: ' + $json.meetingStartISO + '
Subject: ' + $json.subject + '
Meeting #' + $json.trueCount + '
Meeting Key: ' + $json.meetingKey + '
Outlook Event ID: ' + $json.outlookEventId + '

Action: Review whether Lead Stage should move to Appointment Booked.' }}
additionalFields.subject: Review: Meeting booked — consider moving Lead to Appointment Booked

additionalFields.description:
={{ 'PHASE 1 — TASK MODE

Lead: ' + $json.leadEmail + '
Meeting: ' + $json.subject + '
Start: ' + $json.meetingStartISO + '
Calendar: ' + $json.calendarSource + '
Meeting Key: ' + $json.meetingKey + '
Outlook Event ID: ' + $json.outlookEventId + ($json.holidayNote ? '

Holiday note: ' + $json.holidayNote : '') }}
additionalFields.subject: ={{ 'Send 24h meeting reminder — ' + $json.leadName }}

customFieldsValues.value: ={{ $json.task24hExistsOrCreated && $json.task1hExistsOrCreated ? '1 Hour Task Created' : $json.task24hExistsOrCreated ? '24h Task Created' : 'Not Scheduled' }}

parameters.content:
## Fetch + Normalize
Polls Example User (account 1) and
Example Representative (account 2) Outlook calendars.
Lookahead: 30 days.
Both normalized to same format
then merged into one stream.

## Filter + Classify
Skips: cancelled, empty, test-filtered.
Classifies: internal vs external.
Internal domains in Config node.
Expands: 1 item per external attendee.

## Lead Matching
SOQL: Lead WHERE Email = attendeeEmail.
Exact email match guard: extracted email
must equal Lead.Email (trim + lowercase).
No match → skip silently (no alert task).
Lead found → continue downstream.

## Meeting Key + Upsert
Meeting_Key__c = EventId_LeadId
Outlook_Event_ID__c = raw only.
Upserts Meeting_Reminder_Tracker__c.
Calculates reminder times.
Updates Lead summary fields.

## W7: Meeting Booked Detection
✅ [STATUS REDACTED — configure after import]
Polls every 30 min

Duplicate paths fixed ✅
Clean path:
Apply W11 → Pre-Check Tracker Exists → Normalize Pre-Check
→ Pre-Count Tracker Records → Resolve Meeting Number
→ Upsert Tracker → Resolve True Meeting Count
→ Check SF Event Exists Raw → Check + Route SF Event
→ Event Already Exists? → Lead update
→ Check 24h Task Exists (SOQL) → Needs 24h Task?
→ Check 1h Task Exists (SOQL) → Needs 1h Task?
→ Merge Task Context → Update Tracker Flags

Review task: SOQL by Lead + meetingKey in description.
24h/1h tasks: SOQL by Lead + meetingKey + subject prefix.
Tracker upsert: Meeting_Key__c external ID (must be unique in SF).
Calendly body parsing ✅ | No hardcoded IDs ✅

nodes.name: Apply W11 — Update 24h Date If Needed
New Record? — Lead + Review Task Gate

customFieldsValues.value:
={{ 'W7 Meeting Booked Detection

Calendar Source: ' + $json.calendarSource + '
Organizer: ' + $json.organizerEmail + '
Internal Attendees: ' + $json.internalAttendees + '
External Attendees: ' + $json.externalAttendeeEmails + '
Meeting Key: ' + $json.meetingKey + '
Outlook Event ID: ' + $json.outlookEventId }}

nodes.name: Update Lead — Sync Next Meeting Date

parameters.query: ={{ "SELECT Id, WhoId, Subject, Description FROM Task WHERE WhoId = '" + $json.leadId + "' AND Subject = 'Review: Meeting booked \u2014 consider moving Lead to Appointment Booked' ORDER BY CreatedDate DESC LIMIT 50" }}
={{ "SELECT Id, WhoId, Subject, Description FROM Task WHERE WhoId = '" + $json.leadId + "' AND Subject LIKE 'Send 24h meeting reminder%' ORDER BY CreatedDate DESC LIMIT 50" }}
={{ "SELECT Id, WhoId, Subject, Description FROM Task WHERE WhoId = '" + $json.leadId + "' AND Subject LIKE 'Send 1h meeting reminder%' ORDER BY CreatedDate DESC LIMIT 50" }}

main.node: Match Attendee Email to Salesforce Lead
Update Lead — Sync Next Meeting Date

Apply W11 — Update 24h Date If Needed
